name: Codespaces Desktop (Fixed)
postCreateCommand:
sudo apt-get update && \
    sudo apt-get install -y \
      xfce4 xfce4-terminal \
      tigervnc-standalone-server tigervnc-common \
      novnc websockify && \
    mkdir -p ~/.vnc && \
    echo 'vscode' | vncpasswd -f > ~/.vnc/passwd && \
    chmod 600 ~/.vnc/passwd
